comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Implemented. _io/import_ndjson.py (two-pass orchestration) + _provenance.py (record->kwargs). rebar import CLI (FILE/stdin, --dry-run) + rebar.import_tickets(). Reproduces parents/links/tags/comments/file-impact/verify-commands + non-open statuses (in_progress/closed via STATUS, archived via archive()); provenance source_* preserved with fresh ids; dangling parent/link skip+warn; dry-run writes nothing. Tests: tests/interfaces/io/test_import_ndjson.py (5: round-tripтЙбlogical state, provenance+fresh ids, dangling skip, dry-run, file round-trip). io 12 pass, contracts 77 pass. ruff clean. NOTE: idempotency + deferred-push are T4 (this importer always creates).

compiled_state.description:
# T3 тАФ NDJSON import core: rebar import / rebar.import_tickets() (two-pass, composed events)

## Context

P1.2 epic rule-swamp-pupil (ab74-b205-72af-4ce1). Consume our own NDJSON and reproduce the
same logical state in a fresh repo via the NORMAL locked write path (no raw-event
injection). Depends on T1 (provenance plumbing) and T2 (NDJSON format + schema to consume).
Idempotency + deferred-push perf are split into T4; this ticket delivers a correct working
importer (re-runs may duplicate тАФ that gap is closed by T4 and documented here).

## What

- New `src/rebar/_io/import_ndjson.py`, `src/rebar/_io/_provenance.py`.
- `rebar.import_tickets(...)` library fn + `rebar import` CLI (dispatch in
  `_cli/__init__.py`, help `_cli/help/import.txt`, `--dry-run`, `--output`).
- Two-pass:
  - Pass 1: `create_ticket(type, title, description, priority, tags, assignee)` for every
    line (do NOT set parent in CREATE тАФ parent must be open/in_progress); capture
    `{source_id тЖТ new local_id}` id-map. Pass source_* (T1) into the CREATE.
  - Pass 2 (per ticket): `edit_ticket(parent=тАж)`; `link(тАж)` (dedup by
    `(source,target,relation)`); `transition(openтЖТin_progress|closed)` to reproduce non-open
    STATUS; `comment(тАж)` with per-comment source fields; `set_file_impact`/`set_verify_commands`.
- Dangling parent/link target not in the import set тЖТ skip + warn (never fail the run).
- `_provenance.py` maps export line тЖТ create/comment kwargs (source_* extraction).

## Scope

In: correct two-pass importer + STATUS reproduction + dry-run + dangling skip. Out:
idempotent skip-by-source_id, deferred-push perf, large-import docs (all T4).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Round-trip: `export` a store then `import` into a fresh repo reproduces the same
      logical state (status, assignee, parent, links, tags, comments, file_impact,
      verify_commands) modulo fresh ids, with original date/author preserved as `source_*`.
- [ ] Non-open statuses (closed/in_progress) reproduced via STATUS events.
- [ ] Provenance surfaced on imported tickets/comments (source_id/created_at/author/env).
- [ ] Dangling parent/link target тЖТ skipped with a warning; run still succeeds.
- [ ] `--dry-run` reports create counts without writing.
- [ ] Tests: round-trip тЙб logical state, status reproduction, provenance surfacing,
      dangling-link skip, dry-run; `pytest` green.
compiled_state.title: T3 тАФ NDJSON import core: rebar import (two-pass, composed events)
